name: Toffee Bananas
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the bananas and cut each into 5 long diagonal pieces.
2. Sprinkle the banana pieces with flour until well coated.
3. Beat together the batter ingredients in a bowl.
4. Toss the banana pieces in the batter to coat evenly.
5. Heat the oil in a deep fryer or heavy pot to at least 350°F (175°C).
6. Carefully place the coated bananas into the hot oil and fry until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
7. In a small saucepan over low heat, heat the sugar and water for the frosting. Stir until the mixture thickens and forms a syrup-like consistency.
8. Add the banana pieces to the hot oil and toss gently to coat in the sugar syrup.
9. Continue cooking in batches if necessary, until all bananas are coated and caramelized.
10. Remove from heat and serve immediately. Transfer any remaining sauce to a small bowl and keep warm for drizzling over the bananas before serving.
11. (Optional) For extra crispiness, dip each piece of banana briefly into cold water just before eating.
